SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?authorLabel WHERE {
  ?author rdfs:label "Charlotte Brontë" @en .
  BIND("Charlotte Brontë" AS ?authorLabel)
}
```
